name: HealthHub - University OOP Project
desc: Healthcare Management System using Java OOP principles

cards.name: 📝 SRS Document
cards.desc:
Create Software Requirements Specification

**Deliverable:** docs/SRS.md
**Priority:** High
**Due:** Week 1

**Tasks:**
- Introduction and scope
- Functional requirements
- Non-functional requirements
- Use cases
- System constraints

cards.name: 📊 ER Diagram
cards.desc:
Design Entity-Relationship Diagram

**Deliverable:** docs/DIAGRAMS.md (ER section)
**Priority:** High
**Due:** Week 2

**Entities:**
- User (id, username, email, role)
- Patient (extends User)
- Doctor (extends User)
- Appointment (links Patient-Doctor)

cards.name: 👥 Use Case Diagram
cards.desc:
Create Use Case Diagram

**Deliverable:** docs/DIAGRAMS.md (Use Case section)
**Priority:** Medium
**Due:** Week 2

**Actors:**
- Patient
- Doctor
- Admin

**Use Cases:**
- Schedule Appointment
- Complete Appointment
- Cancel Appointment
- Register Patient/Doctor
- Update Information

cards.name: 🏗️ Class Diagram
cards.desc:
Design UML Class Diagram

**Deliverable:** docs/DIAGRAMS.md (Class section)
**Priority:** High
**Due:** Week 3

**Classes:**
- User (base)
- Patient (extends User)
- Doctor (extends User)
- Appointment

**OOP:**
- Encapsulation ✓
- Inheritance ✓
- Polymorphism ✓

cards.name: 💻 Java Classes
cards.desc:
Implement all Java classes

**Deliverable:** src/*.java files
**Priority:** Critical
**Due:** Week 4

**Files:**
- User.java (77 lines)
- Patient.java (118 lines)
- Doctor.java (129 lines)
- Appointment.java (138 lines)
- Main.java (97 lines)

**Requirements:**
- Private attributes
- Constructors
- Getters/Setters
- toString()
- Comments

cards.name: 📚 Documentation
cards.desc:
Complete project documentation

**Deliverable:** docs/ folder
**Priority:** High
**Due:** Week 5

**Files:**
- README.md
- SRS.md (288 lines)
- DIAGRAMS.md (388 lines)
- SKILLS.md (380 lines)
- COMPILE_AND_RUN.md (285 lines)
- INDEX.md (132 lines)
- TRELLO_BOARD.md

**Total:** 1,600+ lines

cards.name: 🎓 Final Delivery
cards.desc:
Prepare final submission

**Deliverable:** Complete project package
**Priority:** Critical
**Due:** Week 6

**Includes:**
- Source code (559 lines)
- Documentation (1,600+ lines)
- Diagrams (Mermaid)
- README instructions
- .gitignore

**Quality:**
- 100% OOP compliance
- Full documentation
- Clean code
- All tests pass
